summary: ANDROID | Device remains connected in app after Bluetooth disconnect
scenario: Device remains shown as connected in Poly Studio Mobile app after disconnecting via Bluetooth menu
description_clean: Device remains shown as connected in the Poly Studio Mobile app after the user disconnects the headset via the Bluetooth menu. Expected behavior: the device state should update to disconnected in the app.
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected and shown on the Home screen.
Open the Android Bluetooth settings menu.
Tap on the connected Poly device and select "Disconnect" or "Forget" to disconnect the headset.
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
Observe the device connection status displayed in the app.
expected: The device state should update to "Disconnected" in the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen.
actual: The device remains shown as "Connected" in the Poly Studio Mobile app even after disconnecting via the Android Bluetooth menu.
